category_sources: source_facts.description: "Peek inside Parquet files right from your terminal".
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as parqeye.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface located.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/kaushiksrini/parqeye; returned null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supplies Parquet terminal inspection purpose; source_facts.executables identifies CLI.
